# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud compute security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vmSize": "Standard_DS1_v2",
    "osDiskName": "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-OSDisk')]",
    "dataDiskName": "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '-DataDisk')]",
    "diskSizeGB": 100
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2023-07-01",
      "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[variables('vmSize')]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": {
            "publisher": "Canonical",
            "offer": "UbuntuServer",
            "sku": "20.04-LTS",
            "version": "latest"
          },
          "osDisk": {
            "name": "[variables('osDiskName')]",
            "caching": "ReadWrite",
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "Standard_LRS"
            }
          },
          "dataDisks": [
            {
              "name": "[variables('dataDiskName')]",
              "diskSizeGB": "[variables('diskSizeGB')]",
              "caching": "ReadWrite",
              "createOption": "Empty",
              "managedDisk": {
                "storageAccountType": "Standard_LRS"
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[parameters('vmName')]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', parameters('nicName'))]",
              "primary": true
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {}
}
